questionHtml: On the axes, sketch Maxwell–Boltzmann energy distribution curves for the reacting species at two temperatures T1 and T2, where T2 > T1.
markschemeHtml:
both axes correctly labelled ✔

peak of T2 curve lower AND to the right of T1 curve ✔

lines begin at origin AND correct shape of curves AND T2 must finish above T1 ✔

 

Accept “probability «density» / number of particles / N / fraction” on y-axis.

Accept “kinetic E/KE/Ek” but not just “Energy/E” on x-axis.

meta.title: On the axes, sketch Maxwell–Boltzmann energy distribution curves for the reacting species at two temperatures T1 and T2, where T2 > T1.
breadcrumbLabels: 6.1 Collision theory and rates of reaction
